Jewellery

Achill Handmade Jewellery

Handcrafted pendants, necklaces & nature-inspired pieces

📍 Cashel Market📍 Keel Market

About Achill Handmade Jewellery

Achill Handmade Jewellery is a beautiful stall that showcases the art of handcrafted jewellery. Each piece is individually made and displayed on stunning wooden boards that are themselves works of art — giving the stall a warm, natural feel that draws people in.

The collection features nature-inspired pendants, delicate necklaces, and unique pieces that capture the spirit of Achill Island's wild landscape. From ocean-blue tones to earthy greens and the warm colours of the island's heather, each creation reflects its surroundings.

Every item is one of a kind, making this stall perfect for finding a truly personal piece of jewellery — whether as a gift or a keepsake from your visit to Achill.

What You'll Find

📿 Handcrafted Pendants

Unique pendants inspired by nature, the sea and Achill's landscape.

✨ Necklaces

Delicate handmade necklaces — each one individually crafted.

🌿 Nature-Inspired

Pieces that reflect the wild beauty of Achill Island's coastline.

🪵 Wooden Displays

Jewellery displayed on handmade wooden boards — art meets craft.
